semantic.role: Pipeline stage that applies LLM-generated patches to automatically fix architectural rule violations in source files.
responsibilities: Group architectural violations by source file for batch processing.
Invoke the LLM via `generateFixPrompt` to produce a concrete fix patch for each violation file.
Apply generated patches to files, recording success, skip, or failure per file through the execution checkpoint.
Support incremental rechecking of fixed files to verify corrections.
Implement the `SpineTask` contract for the fix stage of the pipeline.
outOfScope: CLI command parsing and command dispatch.
Service orchestration unrelated to violation fixing.
Rule definition or rule engine implementation.
Initial scanning or aggregation of violations.
invariants: Only processes violations that have already been detected and stored in previous pipeline stages.
Each fixed file is tracked via the execution checkpoint for resumability.
The task does not initiate scanning or rule loading — it depends on engine-provided violation contexts.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Implement the fix step of the automated compliance pipeline, providing a robust, checkpointed mechanism for applying LLM-suggested code patches to resolve architectural violations.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent git intent directly references this file; current analysis shows no structural changes beyond what is captured in the AST.

publicSurface.description: Class that extends SpineTask to orchestrate the auto-fix of architectural violations by grouping them per file, generating fix prompts via LLM, applying patches, and tracking progress via execution checkpoints.
